title: Comprehensive Bulk and Single-Cell RNA Sequencing Uncovers Senescence-Associated Biomarkers in Therapeutic Mesenchymal Stem Cells
author: Qorri, Erda
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This Zenodo repository contains the filtered featured matrices for P2 and P6 samples from the second single cell RNA Sequencing run reported in the research paper "Comprehensive Bulk and Single-Cell RNA Sequencing Uncovers Senescence-Associated Biomarkers in Therapeutic Mesenchymal Stem Cells".
steps_raw: This Zenodo repository contains the filtered featured matrices for P2 and P6 samples from the second single cell RNA Sequencing run reported in the research paper "Comprehensive Bulk and Single-Cell RNA Sequencing Uncovers Senescence-Associated Biomarkers in Therapeutic Mesenchymal Stem Cells".
